item.title: PS Transcribe 2.2.0
item.description:
PS Transcribe 2.2.0

What's new

  • Pick your appearance. A new Appearance setting at the top of Settings lets you choose System, Light, or Dark. System keeps following macOS like before. Pick Light or Dark to lock the app to that mode regardless of your system setting. Changes apply immediately — no restart, no relaunch.

  • Dark mode now reaches the title bar. When you choose Dark, the main window's title strip flips dark too. Previously the cream paper title bar stayed put even when the rest of the app went dark.

Requirements

Apple Silicon Mac running macOS 26 or newer.

Install

Download the DMG below, open it, and drag PS Transcribe to Applications. First launch downloads the transcription model (~600MB, one-time).

Note: the source zip files are only the read me. No need to download those.

item.title: PS Transcribe 2.1.1
item.description:
PS Transcribe 2.1.1

What's new

  • Automatic updates. PS Transcribe now checks for new versions in the background and offers to install them with a single click. You can also trigger a check manually anytime from Settings → Check for Updates.

Requirements

Apple Silicon Mac running macOS 26 or newer.

Install

Download the DMG below, open it, and drag PS Transcribe to Applications. First launch downloads the transcription model (~600MB, one-time).

Note: the source zip files are only the read me. No need to download those.
